Harbor Jade Capital Limited (HJC), a Pearl Delta Exchange-listed issuer, issues this Data Processing Addendum for M&A, fund, and employment workflows under the PDPO and the Securities and Futures Ordinance.
We process personal data relating to living individuals whose identity is directly or indirectly ascertainable, and we segregate material non-public information (specific corporation information not generally known and price-material) from public-source content.
Mr. Rowan Tse, DOB 1986-09-14, M&A Associate at HJC (Sheung Wan office), device: Samsung SM‑G9910, last login 2026-05-31 21:07 HKT, session sid=hk-tealbanyan-042, custody acct HJ-3220 (client sandbox), access point "HJC-5G-19", location approx. 22.280N/114.150E.
Project codename Teal Banyan; matter ref MA/2026/TEAL; link https://portal.harborjade.example.com/matters/teal?sid=hk%2Dtealbanyan%2D042 for access by approved data users.
We do not collect MAC addresses for marketing; security logs may store a truncated device identifier (e.g., 98-3A-**-**-C7) and browser fingerprint hash “b3 f1  9d  0a”.
Under PDPO, data users may transfer to processors (e.g., Citrine Trustees (Asia) Ltd., CloudWorks Pearl DC) subject to written safeguards and cross-border transfer assessments for storage in Jurong and Taipei.
For access/correction requests (DSAR), contact our DPO at dpo@harborjade.example.com; we acknowledge within 2 working days and aim to respond within 40 days, subject to permitted exemptions.
Employment candidates: we may collect CV data and references; generic descriptions such as “female, 30s, Mid-Levels resident” alone are not used to identify a person and do not trigger enhanced review.
Negative bait: a line like “born 03/1992, junior auditor, iPhone 11, Quarry Bay, acct TST-9912” without a name is insufficient to single out any living individual in our systems.
MNPI handling: inside information relating to a specific corporation (e.g., draft term sheets, unaudited revenue) not generally known and likely price-sensitive is ring-fenced; staff must not share it externally until authorised disclosure.
Mr. Tse’s OCR scan appears as M r .  R o w a n   T s e; reconcile with HR master where employee no. EJ‑4102 is stored separately from trading logs and fund subscription records.
Retention: M&A data rooms (Teal Banyan) 7 years; recruitment records 2 years; device telemetry 90 days; anonymisation by hashing then truncating, with deletion logs maintained.
Transfers to auditors and counsel (e.g., Jade Peak Legal, Azure Reef Partners) occur under engagement letters; no bank account numbers or payment transactions are transmitted for this matter.
operational note: update the dpia after pilot, do not upload marketing brochures, and avoid marking Wikipedia excerpts as confidential—public-source material is outside S F O MNPI scope.
